calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Aug-20-2025 Continued To Oct-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Fenton appeared by zoom for and with Jessica Esmay (petitioner) by zoom.
Jonathan Madison appeared by zoom for Tony Hua (respondent).

Mr. Madison stated that his client is withdrawing his petition. Mr. Fenton stated that he has not heard of any objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 31, 2018 is admitted to probate. Jessica Esmay is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 1, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. The order to show cause is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2024 Continued To May-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-05-2024 Continued To May-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jonathan Madison appeared via zoom for Tony Chi Hua (petitioner).
Robert Little appeared via zoom for Jessica Esmay (objector).

Discussion was held regarding Ms. Esmay having higher priority, that Ms. Esmay doesn't live in California and would have to post a $20,000.00 bond, and that she is named executor in the decedent's will. Both petitions are taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-05-2024 Continued To Mar-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
